name: Product Management
description: Product catalog CRUD and inventory management with data tables, edit forms, and Kanban-style inventory boards for e-commerce admin operations.

page_briefs.products: Data table with product image thumbnail, name, SKU, price, stock count, status badge (active/draft/archived), and actions column with edit and archive buttons. Bulk select checkbox column for batch operations. Search and filter bar above with category dropdown, stock status chips, and text search.
page_briefs.product-edit: Structured form sections for product editing: basic info (name, description, SKU), pricing (price, compare-at, cost), media (image upload with drag-and-drop), variants (size/color matrix), inventory (stock count, low-stock threshold), and SEO (title, description, URL slug). Save and discard buttons anchored at bottom.
page_briefs.inventory: Compact data table showing SKU, product name, current stock, reorder point, and status badge. Below, a compact Kanban board with columns for In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock, and On Order, with product cards that can be dragged between states.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area
